title: Python Turtle Flower Generator
description: A creative Python Turtle project that draws flower-like patterns using loops, angles, and color combinations.
longDescription: This project is one of the first visual experiments in the CoderAnimeMe journey. It focuses on using Python Turtle to create decorative flower-style patterns while practicing loops, functions, and geometric logic. The project is designed as both a learning exercise and a visual coding showcase.
whatILearned: How loops can create repeating visual structures
How Turtle graphics can turn simple logic into visual patterns
How small experiments can become public portfolio projects
